ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "county_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the county belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assembly_districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assembly district */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the district belongs to */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the assembly district */,
  "district_description" TEXT /* Description of the assembly district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assembly_districts_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assembly district the precinct belongs to */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "precinct_location" TEXT /* Location of the precinct */,
  "polling_station" TEXT /* Polling station for the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES assembly_districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "party_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each party */,
  "party_description" TEXT /* Description of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office */,
  "office_description" TEXT /* Description of the office */,
  "term_length" INTEGER /* Term length for the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office the candidate is running for */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party the candidate belongs to */,
  "candidate_description" TEXT /* Description of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct the vote was cast in */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate the vote was cast for */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party the candidate belongs to */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office the candidate is running for */,
  "votes_cast" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast for the candidate in the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election official, data analyst, auditor) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election official */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is an election official */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_officials_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data analyst */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is a data analyst */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the data analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auditors" (
  "auditor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each auditor */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is an auditor */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification of the auditor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auditor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auditors_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
